paper.title: Utilization of recycled fine aggregates and powders in asphalt mixtures

evidence.evidence_text: Potential of recycled ﬁne aggregates powder as ﬁller in asphalt mixture Meizhu Chen 1, Juntao Lin 1, Shaopeng Wu ⇑ Key Laboratory of Silicate Materials Science and Engineering of Ministry of Education, Wuhan University of Technology, Wuhan 430070, PR China article info Article history: Received 10 October 2010 Received in revised form 20 March 2011 Accepted 11 April 2011 Available online 4 May 2011 Keywords: Asphalt mixture Recycled ﬁne aggregates Performance abstract The main objective of this study is to investigate the potential of using recycled ﬁne aggregates powder (RFAP) as ﬁller in asphalt mixtures. RFAP is a by-product of the production of Recycled Concrete Aggre- gate (RCA). The di
